rationale: No new escalation near Romania's borders; Iran deal momentum continues affecting energy costs indirectly.

top_events.title: Iran: deal would lead to Hormuz reopening
top_events.summary: Iran reaffirms Hormuz reopening tied to a deal, sustaining hopes for lower energy prices relevant to Romania's import-dependent economy. No new qualitative step.

top_events.title: Israel strikes south Lebanon, displacement orders issued
top_events.summary: Israeli military action in Lebanon continues; no direct Black Sea or Romanian impact, but regional instability adds to migration pressure background.

top_events.title: China arrests US academic for espionage
top_events.summary: US-China tensions rising; indirect EU trade implications possible but no immediate effect on Romania.
